gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 171)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 171)
text: كَانَ الْحَسَنُ (عليه السلام) أَشْبَهَ النَّاسِ بِمُوسَى بْنِ عِمْرَانَ مَا بَيْنَ رَأْسِهِ إِلَى سُرَّتِهِ وَ إِنَّ الْحُسَيْنَ (عليه السلام) أَشْبَهُ النَّاسِ بِمُوسَى بْنِ عِمْرَانَ مَا بَيْنَ سُرَّتِهِ إِلَى قَدَمِهِ.

en.hubeali: H 14755 – From him, from Salih, from Muhammad Bin Abdullah, from Abdul Malik Bin Basheer, who has narrated the following:

Abu Al-Hassan the Firstasws having said that Al-Hassanasws was the most similar, of the people, to Musa Bin Imranas from what is in between hisasws head to hisasws navel, and that Al-Husaynasws was the most similar of the people, to Musa Bin Imranas from what is in between hisasws navel to hisasws feet’.
en.sarwar: 307. From him, from Salih, from Muhammad Bin Abdullah, from Abdul Malik Bin Basheer, who has narrated the following: Abu Al-Hassan the First (a.s.) having said that Al-Hassan (a.s.) was the most similar, of the people, to Musa Bin Imran (as) from what is in between his (a.s.) head to his (a.s.) navel, and that Al-Husayn (a.s.) was the most similar of the people, to Musa Bin Imran (as) from what is in between his (a.s.) navel to his (a.s.) feet’.
